name: Ternary Koopman-Attention Hybrid (TKA-H) v5
blurb: Pareto-optimal hybrid reasoner alternating 4 Attention and 4 Koopman-SSM layers using Shared-Block Recurrence (2 unique blocks tiled across depth). Employs an 8-stage convergence stack including 3-Phase Curriculum Sequencer (256->1024), Stochastic Depth (0.1), Ternary Noise Injection (0.05), and Self-Distillation KL-anchoring. Features EngramHash v2, EMA shadow weights, and NeoMuon momentum warmup. Crushes the 2.2 BPB barrier within the 16MB/10min constraint.
